economic_notes: Band Revenue segment includes campsite operations, property taxation, and resource management. Contaminated site discovered on reserve land, remediation costs unknown. First Nation has US-denominated foreign bank accounts.
notes: Audit is qualified due to exclusion of budgeted information (not a going concern qualification). Five entities consolidated: Chowethel Axwest Managing Partner Ltd., Chowethel Qaqelstexw LLP, Chowethel Projects LP, Chowethel Projects GP Ltd., Q'awelets Holdings Ltd. Social Development and Health combined as one segment; expenses_social set to 0 and expenses_health reflects the combined segment total. expenses_enterprises used for Band Revenue segment. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($6,357,916) + CMHC ($427,247) + Province of BC ($260,184) + Other government per segment ($1,633,565 residual) = $8,678,912 approximated from segmented other government total of $2,320,996 minus CMHC and BC amounts already listed. Contaminated site contingency disclosed with unknown remediation cost. Minor distribution restricted fund of $2,719,405 held for members under 18. Schedule of remuneration not included in the financial statements.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
